claim_statement: The CMB primordial spectral index n_s is encoded in the TT slope parameter p_D_T = 1.119 via n_s = 1 - (p_D_T - 1) * 2 / d_s, predicting n_s ~ 0.942, within the Planck 2018 constraint n_s = 0.9649 +/- 0.0042.
dataset: Planck CMB TT power spectrum + T-052 best-fit + G18d v2
method: 1) Apply the QNG spectral-tilt formula to compute n_s^QNG from p_D_T and d_s. 2) Propagate uncertainties from d_s (+-0.125) and fitting uncertainty of p_D_T. 3) Compare to Planck 2018 n_s = 0.9649 +/- 0.0042. 4) If discrepancy > 2-sigma, attempt refined mapping using the full transfer function derivation.
pass_condition: n_s^QNG within 3-sigma of Planck 2018 n_s = 0.9649 (accounting for theoretical uncertainty in the mapping formula).
fail_condition: n_s^QNG deviates from 0.9649 by more than 5-sigma after propagating all uncertainties.

parameters.note: Exact formula coefficient requires transfer function derivation; tolerance is 3-sigma.
